'''Yeelhoy''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] of [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] tribe. A scouting mission for [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] was the first hunt for [[Gender/Legends|he]] and his brother, [[Enjikket]].

==Appearances==
*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
